items.question: How do I process a refund or return?
items.answer: Refunds depend on how your workspace is set up—check our refund & returns guide for requirements, permissions, and what happens to stock.

items.question: Can staff use POS on their own phones?
items.answer: Your team logs in through the dashboard in a browser. Use strong passwords and only grant cashier or manager roles as needed.

items.question: How do I add a new staff member?
items.answer: Owners (and users with Staff access, if configured) can invite from Staff in the sidebar. Assign a role before they sign in.

items.question: Where do I find sales and profit summaries?
items.answer: Open Sales analytics and Scheduled reports under the Dashboard. Export options depend on your plan.

items.question: What happens if Wi‑Fi drops during checkout?
items.answer: The web app generally needs connectivity to record payments. See troubleshooting for retries and verifying sales after reconnect.

items.question: How do categories and barcode scanning work?
items.answer: Browse by category from New sale or search by product name/description. Compatible scanners behave like keyboard input in the barcode field.
